visualGoal: Make a mid-tier buyer feel the total-cost-of-ownership decision before the sticker price. Real launch-monitor product proof throughout; no procedural art. Every embedded image is a verified product photo.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic indoor golf simulator bay at soft rim light, a fairway-green hitting mat with an open product-overlay spot beside the ball left empty for a real launch-monitor product photo, out-of-focus glowing simulator screen behind, curator Nina Brooks gesturing toward the sensor spot, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake launch monitor, warped controls, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: Three-year cost of ownership
content: Launch Pro 3-yr can pass hardware price
GC3 ~$6,999 front-loaded, lifetime software, never compounds
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, golf colors, real launch-monitor photos as row markers for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: Premium photometric buy order
content: 2 How do you feel about subscriptions?
5 Confirm room fits a side unit
6 Buy sensor, spend rest on mat/screen
infographicPrompts.style: Numbered ladder, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult golf curator Nina Brooks in a clean indoor simulator bay, one hand resting near a side-of-ball launch monitor spot, calm honest-broker energy, product overlay space beside her, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

openQuestions: Confirm SkyTrak+ clearance stock/price (~$1,995) is still live at certification time.
Confirm current SkyTrak new-customer third-party connector policy (GSPro/E6/TGC) — body flags 'check current'.
Confirm Bushnell one-time club-data unlock (~$1,500) and Launch Pro exclusivity.
Confirm GC3 $6,999 package still bundles the Bushnell Pro X3 LINK rangefinder.
